support_subtitle: Find answers to common questions or contact our support team
support_subtitle_2: Can't find what you're looking for? Send us a message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
support_sublabel_1: Standard shipping typically takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping is available for 1-2 day delivery. You will receive a tracking number once your order ships.
support_sublabel_2: We offer a 30-day return policy for most items. Products must be unused and in original packaging. Simply contact our support team to initiate a return.
support_sublabel_3: Yes, we ship to most countries worldwide. International shipping times vary by location, typically 7-14 business days. Customs fees may apply.
support_label_4: How can I track my order?
support_sublabel_4: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also track your orders by logging into your account and visiting the Orders page.
support_label_5: What payment methods do you accept?
support_sublabel_5: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and various digital payment methods. All transactions are secure and encrypted.
support_label_6: Can I cancel or modify my order?
support_sublabel_6: Orders can be cancelled or modified within 24 hours of placement. After that, the order enters processing and cannot be changed. Contact support immediately if you need assistance.
support_sublabel_7: Yes, we offer price matching on identical products from authorized retailers. Contact our support team with proof of the lower price within 7 days of purchase.
support_label_8: How do I contact customer support?
support_sublabel_8: You can reach our support team via the contact form on this page, email us at support@shophub.com, or call us during business hours. We typically respond within 24 hours.
support_placeholder_3: Please describe your issue in detail...
